order_history.title: Order History
order_history.description: View all your purchase records and invoices
order_history.no_orders_message: You haven't made any purchases yet
order_history.cancel_subscription_message: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? It will stop at the end of the current billing cycle.
order_history.cancel_success: Subscription cancelled successfully! Will stop renewing on {date}.
order_history.cancel_failed: Failed to cancel subscription, please try again later
order_history.subscription_cancelled_message: Your subscription will stop renewing on {date}. To resubscribe, please visit the plans page after {date}.
order_history.no_invoice: No invoice available for this order

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: We value your feedback! Please share your thoughts, suggestions, or any issues you've encountered.
feedback.login_required_message: To ensure feedback quality and prevent spam, please login to your account before submitting feedback.

form.content_placeholder: Please describe your feedback, suggestions, or issues in detail (minimum 10 characters, maximum 2000 characters)
form.note: Your feedback will be securely saved and only visible to the management team for review and processing. We take every feedback seriously and continuously improve our service quality.

validation.content_min_length: Feedback content must be at least 10 characters
validation.login_required: Please login to your account first

feedback.submit_success: Feedback submitted successfully! Thank you for your valuable input. We will process it as soon as possible.
feedback.submit_error: Submission failed. Please try again later or contact support.
